$comment: Per-app IDENTITY for WebAwesome. Copy to your app repo as drx.theme.json and run `drx-theme build`. Only these inputs vary per app; structure comes from @drx-dls/tokens.

fontFaces.$comment: Custom web fonts (web/CSS only) — each emits one @font-face rule. Reference the `family` from the fontFamily stacks above. Native apps bundle/register fonts themselves. `src` may be a woff2/woff/ttf/otf URL (format inferred), a data: URL, or a full CSS src value.

formControl.$comment: Overrides WebAwesome's --wa-form-control-* group (inputs/selects/textareas/buttons). borderColor may be a hex or a variant-tint ref like 'neutral-70'.

devices.$comment: Per-device scale overrides. The palette and typography identity above is SHARED across all devices — only component sizes (scale knobs) differ per platform. These multiply the base device layer (tvOS = 10-foot, iOS = touch). Missing knobs fall back to the base device value. Use `drx-theme build --device ios|tvos` to export a standalone self-contained theme.<device>.css for a separate app repo.
